## Use case

What problem are you trying to solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why they don't work.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links, or examples from other projects.
